name: Domiverse
short_description: You are an overpowered gladiator with the skills to destroy all who stand before you. The only problem is, so is everyone else! Enter the Domiverse for fast and frantic fun in this party brawler made for up to four players in local play.
detailed_description:
Play against your friends in this frenzied arena fighting game.

Face off against up to 3 friends locally in this fun and frenetic arena fighting game. A single mistake can be fatal, and there’s no room for mercy in Domiverse. Your friends are obstacles you must destroy in order to get the power crown. So go for it and become the ultimate champion!

Play as one of Domiverse’s 12 completely crazy heroes. There's Shluuuuups the sausage prince with his laser beams, Uzal the karateka starfish, Snakity the half-cat half-snake hybrid who’s as cute as it is cruel... The selection of fighters is extensive and unique. Discover each character’s special abilities and choose the one that best suits your style!

  • Arena fights for 1 to 4 players locally
  • 12 completely crazy characters, including 4 to be unlocked
  • 3 competitive multi-player modes
  • Arcade and challenge modes for solo players
  • Comics to unlock

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese
